candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus reports conv>=90% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as UNVALIDATED and cap size at 0.5x until historical confirmation accrues.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: size_multiplier *= 0.5
